# Experimental data inventory (auto-generated)

Generated by `paper/build_data_inventory.py` from the binary data files in
`docs/`. This summarizes what already exists **without any new experiments**,
to assess feasibility of a traditional (non-HardwareX) journal contribution.

## Summary

- **Total files under `docs/data_log/`:** 102
- **Files with a parseable material/condition label:** 102
- **Materials (by labeled file count):** Ni4N5 (64), Ni200 (11), crucible (8), Pd (3)
- **Soak temperatures observed (°C):** 900, 1100, 1150, 1200, 1250, 1300, 1325, 1350, 1400
- **Data file types:** xlsx (47), txt (26), jpg (15), lvm (5), png (4), pptx (1), crtx (1), csv (1), tdms (1), tdms_index (1)

### Distinct run IDs by material

- **Ni200:** 7 runs — IFrun001, IFrun002, IFrun003, IFrun004, IFrun005, IFrun080, IFrun081
- **Ni4N5:** 36 runs — IFrun006, IFrun007, IFrun008, IFrun009, IFrun016, IFrun017, IFrun018, IFrun019, IFrun020, IFrun032, IFrun034, IFrun038, IFrun039, IFrun040, IFrun043, IFrun049, IFrun052, IFrun054, IFrun055, IFrun056, IFrun057, IFrun058, IFrun059, IFrun060, IFrun071, IFrun072, IFrun074, IFrun075, IFrun076, IFrun077, IFrun078, IFrun079, IFrun082, IFrun083, IFrun084, IFrun085
- **Pd:** 2 runs — IFRun078, IFrun073
- **crucible:** 4 runs — IFrun035, IFrun036, IFrun037, IFrun043
